title: Discord Server Status
description: Sends discord webhook messages when the server starts and stops
body:
A simple easy to use plugin that uses discord webhooks to send messages whenever your server starts and stops. With customizable messages and title and optionally customize the profile picture and username in the plugin aswell.

Everything can be changed through the config and webhook can be changed both inside the config and in game using the /setwebhook <webhook-url> or the /webhook <webhook-url> command. If you want to change the profile picture and username through the plugin dont forget to toggle the Pfpusername variable to true, or else it won't work.

Reviews are always grateful :D
